name: chisel
description: Design system studio for frontend interfaces. Cut the design, carve it into pages, hone the edges, inspect the work.

commands.name: cut
commands.description: Cut the design — direction, tokens, component showcase
commands.argument_hint: Optional: what you're building (e.g. "admin dashboard", "analytics app")

commands.name: carve
commands.description: Carve the pages — build frontend pages using the design system
commands.argument_hint: What to build (e.g. "dashboard with sidebar", "settings page", "login form")

commands.name: lay
commands.description: Lay out the design — regenerate component showcase

commands.name: hone
commands.description: Hone the edges — tweak tokens, preview, propagate
commands.argument_hint: What to change (e.g. "warmer palette", "rounder buttons", "smaller text")

commands.name: inspect
commands.description: Inspect the work — audit code against the design system
